title: Improve Gibwork Landing Page or Submit a GitHub Enhancement
content:
https://github.com/gibwork/gibwork-website
Gibwork needs updates to its landing page so it more accurately reflects the current product, including mobile app, updated positioning, and overall user experience improvements. This task invites you to either implement a landing page enhancement via Pull Request or propose a well researched improvement through a GitHub issue.

Task Description

Selected participants will be responsible for:

  • Reviewing the current Gibwork landing page and identifying areas that are outdated, unclear, or missing key information about the current product experience, including mobile apps and related features.

  • Completing one of the following options: either create and implement a meaningful landing page enhancement, or write a detailed GitHub issue proposing a specific improvement with clear reasoning and suggested changes.

  • If implementing a change, updating relevant copy, layout, sections, visuals, or calls to action so the page better reflects the current Gibwork product and brand.

  • If submitting an issue, documenting the problem, proposed enhancement, user benefit, and any suggested content, wireframes, or references that would help the team execute the update.

Requirements

  • The enhancement or proposal must be specific to the Gibwork landing page and focused on making it more accurate, modern, and aligned with the current product.

  • Any implementation work should be clear, polished, and production-appropriate, with concise messaging and strong attention to usability across desktop and mobile views.

  • Any GitHub issue submission should be detailed, actionable, and structured so the team can easily review and prioritize it.

  • Do not submit vague suggestions. Include concrete examples such as revised copy, section recommendations, feature framing, layout notes, or mockups where relevant.

What to Submit

  • If you implemented the enhancement: a GitHub pull request URL with your completed changes.

  • If you proposed an enhancement instead: a public GitHub issue URL with a clear title, description, and recommended solution.

  • A short summary document or comment explaining what was changed or proposed and why it improves the landing page.

  • Screenshots of the updated landing page sections or, if submitting an issue only, screenshots or mockups illustrating the suggested improvement.

  • Any supporting asset files, design files, or shared document links used to complete the work.
requirements: Provide a detailed description of your submission and all required deliverables.
